title: Title — Verbitra
description: Hero title slide with brand identity, tagline, and core value propositions.

title: The Problem — Illusion of Knowing
description: The core problem: re-reading creates familiarity, not recall. Visual pull-quote with use case list.

title: The Solution — Three-Phase Method
description: Verbitra's core promise and Read-Scaffold-Remember methodology as a visual flow.

title: How It Works — Phase Detail
description: Three-column detail of all three phases with specific feature callouts per phase.

title: Who It's For — Audience Segments
description: Four-quadrant layout showing primary audience segments with their moment of truth.

title: Market Opportunity — Three Tiers
description: Qualitative market framing across three user tiers with supporting descriptors.

title: Competitive White Space — Positioning Map
description: 2x2 positioning map showing where Verbitra fits relative to generic study tools.

title: Business Model — Freemium Tiers
description: Freemium model with Free and Pro tiers plus conversion and payment rationale.

title: Launch Readiness — Current Build and Next Steps
description: Current shipped features plus immediate launch steps after submission.

title: Go-To-Market — Launch Channels and Replit Story
description: Pre-launch distribution plan, early validation metrics, and explicit use of Replit.

title: Closing — Verbitra
description: Mirror of title slide. App name, tagline, and call to action to bookend the deck.
